description_long: This chest of drawers is constructed from light-colored wood and features a rectangular, flat top surface suitable for placing items. The front face is adorned with four drawers, each fitted with small, round, dark knobs for easy opening. The upper two drawers are smaller and sit side by side, while the lower two are larger and span the width of the chest. The drawer fronts have horizontal slatted detailing, giving the piece a slightly rustic or coastal appearance. The sides and back are plain, with subtle paneling and no additional ornamentation. The overall build is sturdy, with a solid base and slightly overhanging top edges.
description: A light wood chest of drawers with four slatted-front drawers and dark round knobs, featuring a flat top and simple panel sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with slatted fronts and dark knobs, two smaller drawers on top and two larger ones below.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden panel with a small central notch or latch at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view, identical to the left, with a plain wooden panel and no visible features.
